calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this date, February 17, 2026 at 3:30 p.m., having been regularly set as the date for the Motion for Order to Apportion and Distribute Funds by Plaintiffs.

Dept. 304. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda & Edward Santos. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record". Bailiff: Not Present.

Appearances via Zoom:

Kimberly Chu, Esq. appearing for Brayton Purcell.
Chaoyueh "Linda" Kent appearing as Successor-in-Interest and Wrongful Death Heir of Robert Cooke, Deceased.
Shane Cooke, Wrongful Death Heir of Robert Cooke, Deceased.
Robin Cooke, Wrongful Death Heir of Robert Cooke, Deceased.

Chaoyueh "Linda" Kent, Shane Cooke, and Robin Cooke are examined by the Court.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, Plaintiff's Motion for Order to Apportion and Distribute is GRANTED.

The following are entitled to distribution of all net funds obtained by their counsel, Brayton Purcell LLP, derived from funds negotiated after the July 28, 2023 death of ROBERT COOKE in the following proportions:

Estate of ROBERT COOKE, deceased: 0%

CHAOYUEH "LINDA" KENT
as Wrongful Death Heir: 60%

SHANE COOKE
as Wrongful Death Heir: 20%

ROBIN COOKE
as Wrongful Death Heir: 20%

TOTAL: 100%

There being no objection, the signature of CHAOYUEH "LINDA" KENT shall be sufficient on all settlement documents for the purpose of settling both the estate claim and the wrongful death claims.

Proposed order signed as modified. See order for the complete ruling.
